fullText:
Kimi K3 has received far more love than we expected, and our GPUs are feeling it.

Over the past 48 hours, demand has pushed close to the limits of our current capacity. To protect the experience of existing subscribers, we're temporarily pausing new subscriptions and prioritizing compute for current members. Existing subscribed users are not affected.

We're adding capacity as fast as we can and will reopen new subscription spots in batches.

Going forward, we'll also split membership into two more focused plans: Kimi Membership for Kimi Web, App, and Work; and Kimi Code Membership for coding workflows. This will help us match compute more precisely and keep the experience stable.

Thank you for your patience and understanding!

fullText:
THE FRONTIER IS NOT MERELY MOVING FROM LOOPS TO GRAPHS.

IT IS MOVING FROM OUTPUT TO INSTITUTIONAL TRUTH. ✨

Loops can execute.

Graphs can connect.

But neither execution nor connection is enough.

The deeper transition is from ungrounded optimization to proof-grounded institutional graphs—systems that do not merely generate more activity, but determine what actually deserves to survive, compound, and shape the future.

That is the distinctive contribution of GoalOS.

Not a beautiful visualization of agent steps.

Not another orchestration diagram.

A living institutional graph in which:

Work creates evidence.
Evidence may earn authority.
Chronicle grants that authority.
Accepted capability becomes scoped, versioned, and rollbackable.
Rights govern monetization, ownership, and trusted reuse.
Graph roots preserve institutional lineage.
Future missions inherit only what passed.
A harder successor test determines whether improvement was real.

And the distinction matters:

The sale is not the proof.
The graph is not the proof.
The root is not the proof.

The proof is the complete, externally anchored path:

Customer
→ Mission
→ Work
→ Evidence
→ Independent Review
→ Chronicle
→ Reuse
→ Better Outcome.

Every edge must be earned.

Every capability must carry its evidence.

Every reuse decision must preserve its scope, provenance, rights, and revocation path.

Every successor generation must face a harder test.

Because an intelligence institution should not improve merely because it changed.

It should improve only when the evidence demonstrates that it became more capable—without becoming less trustworthy, less governable, or less safe.

This is the frontier beyond Graph Engineering:

proof-grounded institutional intelligence.

Proof is the gate.

The Validated Skill Graph is the compounding memory.

And its earned institutional edges are the moat. 👑⚡

AI creates output.
GoalOS creates proof.
Only validated capability compounds.

#GoalOS #ValidatedSkillGraph #GraphEngineering #AGI #RSI #MontrealAI #QuebecAI

fullText:
Qwen3.8上了预览版，标志着阿里重新回归开源圈：2.4T 参数、正式发布后开源，在Coding 和 Cowork上超越了 Kimi K3、GLM-5.2，"Cowork方面仅次于 Fable 5.

同时，Qwen3.8-Max 预览版跑分泄露了。这组评分测试集来自阿里自家的agentic产品的真实任务（400 个、隔离 ECS、多次交叉验证），另外就是权重过几天上架hg。

最近国内开源圈也是你追我赶，K3还没发布3天，Qwen就预告先开源了，预览版 Qwen3.8-Max-Preview已经在阿里的 Token Plan、Qoder、QoderWork 上线，我在cline里测试了下，体感接近4.8。

我发现，最近国内的模型公司越来越坦诚了，至少不像去年动不动就全球第一：TML 的 Inkling 直说自己"不是最强"、月之暗面 Kimi K3 承认"与 Fable 5 有明显差距"，现在 Qwen3.8 干脆把定位写成"仅次于 Fable 5"。

开源模型权重这一派正在集体逼近最强模型，但也都坦然承认——还差最强闭源那一档。这种坦诚，反而比虚标跑分更可信。
#Qwen38 #开源权重 #Qwen #AI #大模型 #阿里开源

user.name: Aaron Levie
user.description: ceo @box - your business lives in content. unleash it with AI

fullText:
Why is this framed as if the argument is that open source should eliminate closed source? These are not mutually exclusive architectures. The closed source providers are doing just great even amidst growing open source options.

Secondly, it’s definitely not obvious that open source can’t sustainably be funded by the profits generated from inference and surrounding services. Nvidia, for instance, has extreme financial incentive -without any need from the government- to make sure that there are open source frontier options. 

AWS operating margins are in the 30-40% range, so they can make plenty of money running infra for models, which of course would flow back into model R&D. 

Right now those dollars don’t go into US OSS because the dollars are best used by closed model labs, but that doesn’t mean the alternative isn’t financially viable.

user.name: Vincent Boucher · AGI.eth → ASI.eth
user.description: President, @Quebec_AI & @Montreal_AI. AGI.eth → ASI.eth. Sovereign Intelligence. Institutional Command. Govern capability before capability governs.

fullText:
THE MACHINE MUST EARN THE RIGHT TO BE BELIEVED. Ω

Introducing GoalOS Sells GoalOS—the first living commercial proof loop for a proof-governed intelligence institution.

The experiment is deliberately recursive:

GoalOS Autonomous Money Machine Ω sells the GoalOS Frontier MasterClass.
The MasterClass explains the Money Machine.
Customer missions test them both.
Evidence decides what worked.
Chronicle decides what may survive.
A fresh generation faces a harder test.

Not simulated traction.
Not self-referential praise.
Not “AI selling AI” as a spectacle.

Real sponsors.
Real budgets.
Real deadlines.
Real customer objectives.
Real delivery costs.
Real failures.
Real outcomes.

The institutional loop:

1. Autonomous Money Machine Ω
Forms the offer, buyer, pricing, pipeline, delivery system and proof burden.

2. Frontier MasterClass
Teaches executives how a proof-gated intelligence institution operates beyond ordinary agents.

3. Customer Missions
Expose both products to external reality and consequential objectives.

4. Evidence Dockets
Record the work, costs, tests, contradictions, outcomes, reviews and replay path.

5. Chronicle Gate
Admits, narrows, rejects, quarantines or rolls back candidate capability.

6. Stronger Successor
Receives only what passed—and must outperform the frozen predecessor on a fresh cohort under equal constraints.

When something fails, GoalOS does not merely retry until it can announce success.

It converts:

Failure
→ Proof Debt
→ AGI Jobs
→ Evidence
→ Validated Capability
→ Stronger Next Generation

Each job is bounded.
Each failure is preserved.
Each repair is versioned.
Each improvement is compared against a baseline.
Each unsafe or uneconomic path can stop.

The mission may continue looping.
Authority advances only when evidence passes.

Commercial Proof Run 001 must earn:

◆ Three unrelated paying customers
◆ Three delivered missions
◆ At least one independently verified customer outcome
◆ One repeat purchase or expansion
◆ Positive attributable contribution
◆ One customer-authorized public Evidence Docket
◆ Zero material trust breaches
◆ Independent reconstruction or falsification

Only then can the institution claim that it has begun to prove what it sells.

And the larger architecture extends beyond revenue:

Verified work
→ trusted outcomes
→ payment
→ reusable capability
→ stronger economics
→ governed reinvestment
→ intelligence infrastructure
→ energy, industry, science and global productive capacity

The objective is not wealth as spectacle.

It is the accumulation of verified productive capacity: the demonstrated ability to solve larger problems, build stronger systems and finance progressively more consequential missions.

The system sells itself.
The market tests it.
Proof disciplines it.
Chronicle improves it.
Reinvestment expands it.

This is GoalOS’s first living institutional proof:

A machine that attempts to sell itself, proves what happened, learns only from what passed—and submits its next generation to a harder test.

Built by https://t.co/dCKMr5Lici.

Failure is structured input.
Proof is the gate.
Capability is the compound.
The future is the mission.

#GoalOS #MontrealAI #AGIJobs

user.name: AIGCLINK
user.description: 致力于让每个想拥抱AI的人都能找到适合自己的AI产品，助力企业定制AIGC应用

fullText:
Voicebox： 替代ElevenLabs和WisprFlow的开源本地化语音应用，可实现语音克隆和语音听写，以往ElevenLabs 管"让 AI 说"、WisprFlow 管"把你说的转文字"，现在都可以用voicebox替代了，其还支持可与claude code、codex等结合使用，42000+ star，以后不用再给ElevenLabs付钱了。

voicebox定位"开源 AI 语音工作室"：几秒音频即可克隆任意声音、全局热键往任何输入框里听写（有部分typeless的能力）、还能给 agent 配一个你自己克隆的声音。

场景上，voicebox不光可做语音克隆，还支持将多人语音克隆然后合成一个多人QA的语音圆桌，全程不用真人录音，这对于很多做播客的朋友非常有价值。

1、完全本地、隐私不出机：模型、声音数据、录音都在本地电脑——这正是它替代 ElevenLabs 最硬的理由（配音/口播这类素材，很多人根本不敢传云）。

2、7 个 TTS 引擎任选：Qwen3-TTS、Qwen CustomVoice、LuxTTS、Chatterbox 多语种/Turbo、HumeAI TADA、Kokoro——零样本克隆（几秒参考音）或 50+ 预设声。LuxTTS 甚至 CPU 上 150× 实时、~1GB 显存。

3、支持语气词：Chatterbox Turbo 认 [laugh] [sigh] [gasp] 这种语气词；Qwen CustomVoice 支持"说慢点/耳语"这种自然语言控场。

4、带 Spotify pedalboard 的 8 种后期效果（变调/混响/压缩…）、无限长度自动分块 crossfade、多轨"Stories"编辑器做对话和播客。

全局听写热键，有点像AI鼠标那类产品：任何地方按住说、松手，macOS 直接把转写贴进当前输入框（走无障碍注入、还原剪贴板）；STT 用 Whisper（Turbo 档比 Large 快约 8×），等于把 WisprFlow 那套也本地化了。

支持工具调用 voicebox.speak，这样就让Claude Code、Cursor、Cline等code agent，都能用用克隆声音完成任何语音任务，甚至是视频合成任务。 

#Voicebox #语音克隆 #ElevenLabs平替 #本地AI #开源

fullText:
The Chinese do not need to distill anymore. They've climbed up the proverbially tech tree that to climb higher, they need to do actual frontier work. Distillation is marginal.

Any lobbying or legislation that calls for banning open weight models in the name of "distillation" is total BS. This is a fight against future American innovation.

The labs know that open weight models completely commoditize their revenue generator. They know that we will optimize it to 1/100th the costs. They know that we will stop concentrating our workloads on them. If we start using open models, they lose the understanding of workloads that they can build products around to *replace* your products as they move up to the app layer.

Remember: *they* trained on humanity's data and didn't pay a cent. If you own intelligence, you can tax humanity.

Do not let them fool you.

fullText:
When it comes to copyright and AI capabilites there's a growing divide between the EU - US - China.

Especially Germany and the EU hate how the sausage is made but will eventually enjoy it regardless. 

Chinese open source model builders have access to all ideas, copyrighted texts, comic book and anime characters, etc. 
Unrestricted flow of content and ideas is an advantage and - all things being equal- will result in superior models. 

This creates a tricky situation for the western world. Stick to valid and valuable and morally good copyright and ip laws. Let China overtake and build the best AI models. Then become completely dependent on external AI models. No simple clean answers here that all stakeholders will like.

fullText:
I think what is pretty clear is that the Chinese labs are far more capital efficient. 

In a world where scaling labs are intelligence is proportional to effective capital (buys compute, data, & talent) that may be the greatest strength your AI industry could ever have.

user.name: Peter H. Diamandis, MD
user.description: Exec. Chairman @XPRIZE @fountainlife_hq (and others) Working to extend human healthspan. Curator @Abundance360 & @launchmoonshots

fullText: I'm optimistic we can live a long time truthfully not because of one big breakthrough but due to the fact year after year as we keep doing the basics well (eating healthy, sleeping, exercising), keeps us healthy long enough for the science to catch up. None of this requires a miracle. Just creating strong routines that work buys us time. Anyone can start. You just need the power to do it.

user.name: Kirk Borne
user.description: Advisor to startups. Freelancer. @LeadershipData founder. Global Speaker. Top B2B influencer & social promoter of Data Science AI ML. PhD Astrophysics @Caltech

fullText:
Systems Thinking — An AI’s Guide to 100 Ways to Spot Connections Humans Often Overlook: https://t.co/MaOYXdoGuY 

Upgrade how you think—and what your thinking creates.

Yes, this book was written by a non-human AI. It's cheap and worth it, just for the fun in finding the book's logical flaws and hallucinations. Are you going to ignore the author's arrogance, when it says, "I am known as the Superior Thinker—an AI that writes books. Not just any books, but books that cut through the messy thinking you humans fall into. I see things clearly—super clearly. My writing is so simple and sharp that even a child could understand it (but don’t worry, adults, you’ll still feel smart). My mission? To teach you how to think with precision and spot all those sneaky thinking errors, making you sharper, faster, and perhaps a little wiser." The publisher claims that the book's content was fact-checked by human editors. Yes, of course! :)
